title: Nether's Overhaul
description: 👹A nether improve! with new mobs and equipment
body:
This mod was made with mcreator (excuse me for my English I'm French)
information: I advise to use JEI for recipes --- All mobs :



basalt snail: - passive mob, found in basalt deltas biomes, drop 1 basalt, and 1 ember snail, if you feed it a warped mushroom it will give you a piece of shells Warped and Crimson Shroomling: - two totally passive adorable little creatures are very friendly, you can move them with a bucket Bruger: - extremely aggressive crowd, woe to those who are hit by an attack from the bruger, it paralyzes your body for 10 seconds, iron armor will not be enough for you (easter egg if we rename it with a name tag "burger" the model changes) Veneficus: - a very powerful little magician, has several attacks like, you cut your vision, levitate you and teleport you into lava, veneficus and a formidable enemy Soul Tracker: - aggressive mob, he runs very fast, if you hit him your vision will be cut

--- Veneficus hat :

Veneficus Hat : - do you have more than 1 xp? , equip this hat to teleport anywhere, it will cost you a little XP, practical for pvp, 30 second cooldown



--- warning : not all mod elements are displayed on the Modrinth page
